description: Dota 2 mod manager for hero cosmetics, HUD, weather, and terrain with auto-patching
rules: Strictly follow the MVP (Model-View-Presenter) pattern: WinForms are View-only (no business logic/service calls), Presenters handle UI logic, Services handle business logic.
Use Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection for all service resolution via constructor injection.
All async methods must accept CancellationToken as the last parameter and propagate it.
All file writes to the Dota 2 installation folder must go through FileTransactionService with rollback on failure.
Return OperationResult or OperationResult<T> for fallible operations instead of throwing.
Use IAppLogger for all logging, never Console.WriteLine, Debug.Print, or direct Trace statements.
JavaScript/C# communication in WebView2 hybrid forms must only go through CoreWebView2.WebMessageReceived using structured JSON messages.
